groups.title: Battery
groups.description: Battery voltage windows and discharge limits.

capabilities.title: Off-Grid Output
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20101; the write function code is undocumented, single-register write assumed.
capabilities.change_summary: Enables inverter output when the grid is absent.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH PV RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.3 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Power Save (Search Mode)
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20104.
capabilities.change_summary: Enables load-search power saving.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH PV RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.3 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Grid Charging
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20106.
capabilities.change_summary: Allows the battery to charge from the grid.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH PV RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.3 xlsx; write path not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Charge Source Priority
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20143; the protocol defines no value 1.
capabilities.change_summary: Chooses which source charges the battery.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH PV RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.3 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

choices.label: Solar First
choices.description: Charge from solar first, utility assists.

choices.label: Solar and Utility
choices.description: Charge from solar and utility together.

capabilities.title: Grid Max Charge Current
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20125 (1.0-80.0 A DC, raw 0.1 A).
capabilities.change_summary: Limits the battery charge current taken from the grid.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH PV RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.3 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Max Combined Charge Current
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20132 (solar + grid total, 1.0-140.0 A DC, raw 0.1 A).
capabilities.change_summary: Limits the total battery charge current from all sources.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH PV RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.3 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Inverter Output Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20102 (documented 220.0-240.0 V, raw 0.1 V). Window intentionally left wide; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the inverter AC output voltage.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Inverter Output Frequency
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20103 (raw 0.01 Hz; 5000 = 50 Hz, 6000 = 60 Hz).
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the inverter output frequency.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: PV Max Charge Current
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10108 (raw 0.1 A). Window intentionally left wide; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Limits the battery charge current taken from PV.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Float Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10103 (raw 0.1 V). Window intentionally left wide because the documented range is battery-voltage-grade dependent; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the battery float charge voltage.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Absorption Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10104 (raw 0.1 V). Window intentionally left wide because the documented range is battery-voltage-grade dependent; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the battery absorption (boost) charge voltage.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Battery Type
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10110.
capabilities.change_summary: Selects the battery chemistry charge profile.
capabilities.support_notes: Enum from SmartESS cloud device_settings for this firmware; register from RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx. The SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model; awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Battery Stop Charging Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20119 (raw 0.1 V). Window intentionally left wide because the documented range is battery-voltage-grade dependent; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the voltage at which charging stops.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Battery Stop Discharging Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20118 (raw 0.1 V). Window intentionally left wide because the documented range is battery-voltage-grade dependent; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the voltage at which discharging stops.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Battery Low Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20127 (raw 0.1 V). Window intentionally left wide because the documented range is battery-voltage-grade dependent; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the battery low-voltage warning threshold.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Battery High Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20128 (raw 0.1 V). Window intentionally left wide because the documented range is battery-voltage-grade dependent; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the battery high-voltage threshold.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Inverter Max Discharge Current
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20113 (raw 0.1 A). Window intentionally left wide because the documented range is battery-voltage-grade dependent; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Limits the inverter discharge current.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Energy Use Mode
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20109; enum values are battery-voltage-grade dependent (values below confirmed from this unit's cloud settings).
capabilities.change_summary: Chooses the output source priority order.
capabilities.support_notes: Enum from SmartESS cloud device_settings for this firmware; register from RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx. The SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model; awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

choices.label: SBU (Solar, Battery, Utility)
choices.description: Solar first, then battery, then utility.

choices.label: SUB (Solar, Utility, Battery)
choices.description: Solar first, then utility, then battery.

capabilities.title: Grid Protection Standard
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20111.
capabilities.change_summary: Selects the grid interconnection protection standard.
capabilities.support_notes: Enum from SmartESS cloud device_settings for this firmware; register from RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx. The SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model; awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Solar Use Priority
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20112.
capabilities.change_summary: Chooses whether solar serves load or battery first.
capabilities.support_notes: Enum from SmartESS cloud device_settings for this firmware; register from RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx. The SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model; awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

choices.label: LBU (Load, Battery, Utility)
choices.description: Solar serves load first, then battery.

choices.label: BLU (Battery, Load, Utility)
choices.description: Solar charges battery first, then load.

capabilities.title: Discharge to Grid
capabilities.note: MUST PH holding register 20108.
capabilities.change_summary: Allows the inverter to export battery energy to the grid.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; the SmartESS cloud exposes this control in its device settings for this model, awaiting on-hardware write confirmation.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10118.
capabilities.change_summary: Enables periodic battery equalization charging.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; datasheet-only control (not exposed by the SmartESS cloud); not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization Voltage
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10119 (raw 0.1 V). Window left wide; the inverter validates its own range.
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the battery equalization charge voltage.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; datasheet-only control (not exposed by the SmartESS cloud); not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Battery Capacity
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10111 (1 Ah).
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the configured battery bank capacity.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; datasheet-only control (not exposed by the SmartESS cloud); not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Equalization Duration
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10121 (documented 5-900 min).
capabilities.change_summary: Sets how long an equalization cycle runs.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; datasheet-only control (not exposed by the SmartESS cloud); not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Equalization Timeout
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10122 (documented 5-900 min).
capabilities.change_summary: Sets the maximum time before an equalization cycle times out.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; datasheet-only control (not exposed by the SmartESS cloud); not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Equalization Interval
capabilities.note: MUST PV charger holding register 10123 (documented 0-90 days).
capabilities.change_summary: Sets how often equalization runs.
capabilities.support_notes: From PH1800/PV1800/EP1800/PV3500/EP3500 RS485 Modbus RTU 1.4.15 xlsx; datasheet-only control (not exposed by the SmartESS cloud); not yet confirmed on hardware.
